title: plesiagopus rotundifolia
side_effects: Plesiagopus rotundifolia can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its toxic compounds. In some cases, it may also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling, in individuals who are sensitive to its properties. Overuse or misuse of the plant can lead to more severe side effects, including respiratory problems and irregular heartbeat. If not handled carefully, plesiagopus rotundifolia can also cause neurological symptoms like dizziness, confusion, and tremors.
